special_mechanics.name: Super Scope Light Gun Control
special_mechanics.description: Game requires Super Scope light gun peripheral for SNES. Player acts as gunner of ST Falcon mech, targeting enemy weak points.

special_mechanics.name: Energy Bolt Charging
special_mechanics.description: Energy bolts charge passively when player is not firing. Single shot fires once power meter fills.

special_mechanics.name: Projectile Interception
special_mechanics.description: Player can counter enemy fire by intercepting projectiles. Some enemy attacks can only be deflected by energy bolts.

tier_notes: Battle Clash is a light gun shooter with fixed player position (ST Falcon gunner). No traditional platformer movement parameters exist. Game mechanics center on aiming, charging, and projectile interaction rather than player character physics. Tier 3 classification: Wikipedia article provides gameplay overview but no technical physics documentation.
